title: How Long Do Listings Stay Live?
metaDescription: Wondering how long do listings stay live on BuyAndScrap.com? Get the straightforward answer about our 28-day listing period and easy renewal options. Sell your car with ease!
targetKeyword: how long do listings stay live
content:
## So, How Long Do Listings Stay Live on BuyAndScrap.com?

It’s a great question, and one we hear a lot! When you’re selling your car, you want to know exactly what to expect from start to finish. So, let’s get straight to it: **how long do listings stay live** on BuyAndScrap.com?

Generally speaking, your car advert will remain active and visible to potential buyers for **28 days** from the moment it goes live. We believe this duration strikes a perfect balance, giving your car ample time to find a new owner without letting old listings clutter up the marketplace.

## The Standard Listing Period: What to Expect

When you place an advert for your car on BuyAndScrap.com, it will be published for a standard period of 28 days. This timeframe is designed to keep our marketplace fresh and current, ensuring that buyers are looking at cars that are genuinely available for sale.

### Why Not Forever?

A finite listing period benefits everyone. For buyers, it means fewer 'ghost' listings for cars that have already sold or are no longer available. For sellers, it encourages active management of your advert and prompts you to refresh your approach if your car hasn't sold within the initial period. It helps maintain the quality and relevance of our platform, meaning serious buyers see serious sellers.

## Need More Time? Extending Your Listing is Easy!

Life happens, and sometimes a car takes a little longer to sell than anticipated. If your car hasn't found its new home within the initial 28 days, don't fret! We make it incredibly easy to extend your listing.

Before your advert expires, we'll send you a friendly reminder via email. You'll then have the option to renew your listing for another 28 days, often with just a couple of clicks from your personal dashboard. Our aim is to make selling your car as hassle-free as possible, so you remain in control.

## What Happens When Your Listing Expires?

If you choose not to renew your listing, or simply miss the renewal window, your advert will automatically be removed from public view. Don't worry, it won't just vanish without a trace! You'll still be able to access its details in your BuyAndScrap.com account, should you wish to relist it later.

## Our Goal: A Quick and Smooth Sale

We want you to sell your car quickly and efficiently. By clearly defining **how long do listings stay live** and offering simple renewal options, we aim to provide a transparent and user-friendly experience. We're here to support you every step of the way, making sure your car gets the visibility it deserves.

Ready to list your car and find it a new home?
